name: Dex
bio:
Meet Dex, short for Declan. Dex is pure joy, with a big personality and playful spirit. He dreams of becoming a teacher and already practices in the mirror.

Dex was adopted at birth. His parents learned just weeks before he arrived that he had Down syndrome. Dex also has autism and is preparing for high school—a big milestone. As he grows, so does his need for independence. Having his own space is an important next step. Your support will help create a bedroom designed just for Dex, giving him a place to learn, relax, and grow. Donations go directly to adaptive furniture, sensory-friendly features, and confidence-building tools for Dex as he starts this new chapter.

Dex shares a room with his little brother, Gus. With high school approaching, having his own space has become important. Sometimes Dex wakes up at 2am ready to play and explore. This disrupts the whole family's rest, especially as routines and schoolwork become more demanding. A bedroom just for Dex will give him a safe place, help him adjust, and give his family a chance to recharge.

This is more than a room makeover. It is a launchpad—a place where Dex can build routines, gain confidence, and practice the life skills he will need as he grows up.

Help us transform Dex’s future—donate now to create his safe, empowering space. Your gift brings this vision to life and directly supports Dex on every step of his journey. Join us today and be part of the change.

And yes, there will definitely be a mirror for his teaching practice.
heroSummary: Dex is a joyful teen with big dreams of becoming a teacher. As he prepares for high school, a space of his own will help him build independence, confidence, and life skills for the future.
